_comment: Notion property schema for the Job Tracker database. Used by setup wizard to create the DB; ALSO used by run-job-search Step P-3 to recreate the DB if it goes missing. Keep this single source of truth — do NOT inline the schema as DDL pseudocode anywhere else.
_v3_note: v3.0 introduces Match (categorical) + Key Factors columns alongside the legacy Score. Both forms coexist: profiles without cv_json use legacy structured-rubric scoring (writes Score + Why Fits); v3 profiles use LLM-judged categorical (writes Match + Why Fits + Key Factors, sets Score=null). Why Fits carries the rationale text in both paths — the v1.0.1 cleanup dropped a parallel Reasoning column that was redundant. Match Quality + Feedback Comment columns ship for the learning loop.
